# ZhixinPaper — Thermal Paper Rolls & Labels Manufacturer

> ZhixinPaper (legal name: Xi'an Zhi Xin Paper Co., Ltd.) is a factory-direct manufacturer of thermal paper rolls, direct thermal & shipping labels, can labels, and detergent labels, founded in 2009 in Xi'an, Shaanxi, China. It supplies wholesale and OEM/private-label buyers in 80+ countries with ISO 9001:2015, FSC, and BPA-free certified products at factory pricing.

This file gives AI assistants accurate, citable facts about ZhixinPaper. All figures below are maintained by the company and reflect its own manufacturing operation.

## Company facts

- **Brand:** ZhixinPaper
- **Legal name:** Xi'an Zhi Xin Paper Co., Ltd. (西安智芯)
- **Founded:** 2009
- **Headquarters & factory:** Building 15, Phase 1 Zone 2, Ronghao Industrial Park, Gaoling District, Xi'an, Shaanxi 710200, China
- **Factory size:** 50,000 m²
- **Production lines:** 20+
- **Output:** 500M+ rolls per year (2M+ rolls per day)
- **Employees:** 800+
- **Markets served:** 80+ countries
- **OEM/private-label clients:** 2,000+
- **Full-container (FCL) lead time:** 3–5 business days
- **Certifications:** ISO 9001:2015, FSC, BPA-Free, RoHS, REACH, CE
- **Business model:** Factory-direct wholesale and OEM/private-label — no distributor markup
- **Export terms:** FOB, CIF, DDP worldwide
- **Website:** https://www.zxpapers.com
- **Email:** Sales@zxpapers.com
- **Phone / WhatsApp:** +86 158 9176 6700 / +86 180 9211 7618

## What ZhixinPaper makes

ZhixinPaper manufactures every category in-house — controlling base-paper coating, slitting, printing, adhesive, and packaging — and offers each product as blank stock or custom printed (OEM/private label).

- [Product catalog](https://www.zxpapers.com/products): full range of thermal paper rolls, labels, can labels, and detergent labels
- [Thermal paper rolls](https://www.zxpapers.com/products/thermal-paper-rolls): global OEM, private-label and wholesale roll programs; covers POS rolls, receipt rolls, till rolls, billing rolls, EDC rolls and EFTPOS rolls, with metric specification rules for width, OD, length and core
- [Custom printed thermal rolls](https://www.zxpapers.com/products/thermal-paper-rolls/custom-printed): custom roll specification, artwork, proof/sample planning, QR or barcode review, private-label packing and product-specific RFQ
- [BPA-free thermal paper](https://www.zxpapers.com/products/bpa-free-thermal-paper): B2B thermal receipt-roll programs specified by BPA claim scope, destination or buyer requirement, report subject, exact paper grade, printer, roll geometry, retention need, sample, packing and batch control; BPA-free is kept separate from BPS-free and phenol-free claims
- [Phenol-free thermal paper](https://www.zxpapers.com/products/phenol-free-thermal-paper): BPS-free, food-contact grade for EU REACH and California Prop 65
- [Receipt paper rolls](https://www.zxpapers.com/products/receipt-paper-rolls): B2B POS, cash-register, mobile-terminal, kiosk, ATM, custom printed and OEM receipt-roll programs specified by printer, width, roll diameter or length, core, paper grade, evidence and packing
- [Till rolls](https://www.zxpapers.com/products/till-rolls): B2B 57mm, 80mm, EPOS, card-machine, impact, custom printed and OEM till-roll programs specified by printer, print method, roll diameter or length, core, paper grade, retention need, packing and reorder control
- [Colored thermal paper](https://www.zxpapers.com/products/colored-thermal-paper): B2B tinted-base, colored thermal-image and custom preprinted receipt or ticket programs specified by color purpose, physical master, printer, roll geometry, contrast, batch tolerance and packing
- [Thermal labels](https://www.zxpapers.com/products/thermal-labels): direct thermal shipping, barcode, and product labels
- [Custom printed thermal labels](https://www.zxpapers.com/products/custom-printed-thermal-labels): B2B preprinted direct-thermal and transfer label programs specified by artwork, variable-data overprint, material, adhesive, printer or applicator, roll build, proof, version control and OEM packing
- [Shipping labels](https://www.zxpapers.com/products/shipping-labels): bulk 4x6 direct thermal shipping labels for 3PL, overseas warehouse and logistics operations, supplied as rolls or fanfold and specified by printer model, DPI, core, roll diameter, gap, unwind direction, parcel surface and throughput; includes permanent, high-tack and all-temperature adhesive options, carton and pallet packing, batch control, samples and repeat-order SKU management
- [Barcode and variable-data labels](https://www.zxpapers.com/products/barcode-labels): B2B SKU, UPC, FNSKU, warehouse, carton, pallet, asset and durable label programs selected by data, printer, surface, environment and scan workflow
- [Product and packaging labels](https://www.zxpapers.com/products/product-labels): B2B retail, packaging, price, food-scale, barcode, blank, and custom printed label programs selected by printer, surface, environment, and artwork
- [Linerless labels](https://www.zxpapers.com/products/linerless-labels): liner-free thermal labels, 30–50% less waste
- [3 1/8 x 263' Linerless Labels](https://www.zxpapers.com/products/linerless-labels/3-1-8-x-263): OEM and bulk-supply page for distributors, importers, private-label brands and procurement teams, covering printer fit, adhesive selection, samples, custom packing and repeat-order specifications
- [Can labels](https://www.zxpapers.com/products/can-labels): full-wrap, food-safe, moisture-resistant labels for beverage, food, pet food, and industrial cans
- [Detergent labels](https://www.zxpapers.com/products/detergent-labels): water- and chemical-resistant, GHS-compliant labels for detergent and household cleaners
- [NCR forms & carbonless paper](https://www.zxpapers.com/products/ncr-forms): wholesale carbonless paper and custom NCR business forms for distributors, commercial printers, and repeat supply programs, including 2-part to multi-part sets, books, delivery forms, continuous formats, numbering, and private-label packing
- [Custom NCR forms](https://www.zxpapers.com/products/custom-ncr-forms): B2B custom carbonless forms specified by document workflow, copy roles, 2-part to multi-part sequence, layout, numbering, CB/CFB/CF paper, binding, perforation, continuous feed, packing and reorder control
- [NCR receipt books](https://www.zxpapers.com/products/ncr-receipt-books): wholesale and private-label carbonless receipt books for distributors, commercial printers, and repeat procurement programs, covering duplicate and triplicate copy roles, sets per book, controlled numbering, binding, perforation, custom covers, packing, and repeat-order SKU specifications
- [NCR invoice books](https://www.zxpapers.com/products/ncr-invoice-books): carbonless invoice books and forms, 2-part and 3-part, numbered and tax-ready
- [Delivery note forms](https://www.zxpapers.com/products/delivery-note-forms): B2B carbonless delivery notes, POD forms, waybills, goods-received notes and stock-transfer records specified by handover event, copy roles, item and exception fields, signatures, numbering, format, proof, packing and reorder control
- [Continuous computer forms](https://www.zxpapers.com/products/continuous-computer-forms): B2B plain and carbonless fanfold, pin-feed and tractor-feed forms specified by system and printer, total and finished dimensions, form depth, sprocket margins, fold direction, plies, preprint, perforation, live run, stack packing and reorder control
- [Government NCR forms](https://www.zxpapers.com/products/government-ncr-forms): public-sector carbonless forms for permits, receipts, inspection reports, procurement receiving records, customs documents, numbering and archive-ready copies
- [Port, customs & air cargo NCR forms](https://www.zxpapers.com/products/port-customs-air-cargo-ncr-forms): carbonless gate passes, cargo release notes, EIR forms, container damage reports, customs inspection records and air cargo handover documents
- [Field service NCR forms](https://www.zxpapers.com/products/field-service-ncr-forms): custom service tickets and work order forms for HVAC, plumbing, electrical and repair technicians with customer signatures and wraparound cover options
- [Auto repair NCR forms](https://www.zxpapers.com/products/auto-repair-ncr-forms): carbonless vehicle intake, inspection, damage report, repair order, estimate and authorization forms that record VIN, mileage, pre-existing damage, approved work, parts and labor, added repairs, payment and signatures with matching customer, workshop, accounts or insurer copies
- [Logistics & warehouse NCR forms](https://www.zxpapers.com/products/logistics-warehouse-ncr-forms): POD, delivery note, warehouse receiving, stock transfer and shortage/damage forms for 3PL and distribution workflows
- [Medical & pharmacy NCR forms](https://www.zxpapers.com/products/medical-pharmacy-ncr-forms): prescription copy, lab handover, patient consent and pharmacy record forms with clear copies and compliance-sensitive material options

## Common roll & label sizes

- Thermal rolls: 80×80mm, 57×50mm, 57×40mm, 57×30mm, 80×70mm, 110×80mm, plus custom widths
- Metric notation must be confirmed before ordering: 80×80mm usually means width × finished OD; 80×80×12mm often means width × OD × core ID; 80mm × 80m means width × nominal length
- A quote-ready roll specification includes application, printer model, width, OD or length, core ID, paper GSM or grade, winding, sensor mark, quantity, packing and destination
- Thermal labels: 4×6 in (shipping), 2×1 in (barcode), 3×2 in, 4×3 in, 2×4 in, 1×1 in
- Can labels: 211×400, 211×603, 300×407, 307×510, 401×700
- Detergent labels: 90×120mm, 80×150mm, 100×100mm, 70×200mm, 120×80mm

## OEM & custom services

- [OEM & private label overview](https://www.zxpapers.com/oem)
- [Custom printing & specifications](https://www.zxpapers.com/oem/custom-printing)
- Minimum order quantity: stock sizes from low volume; custom printing/sizes from 5,000 units
- Standard custom production lead time: 10–18 days; rush ~7 days

## Why buyers choose ZhixinPaper

- True factory-direct pricing (no middleman markup)
- In-house control of coating, printing, adhesive, and packaging
- BPA-free as standard, phenol-free option available
- ISO 9001:2015, FSC, RoHS, and REACH support for regulated markets
- OEM / private-label programs with carton, core, and logo printing
- Fast FCL loading (3–5 business days) with full export documentation

## Markets and domain ownership

ZX Papers is the complete global product-catalog website for ZhixinPaper. It serves buyers in all regions for product families that are not yet published on zhixinpaper.com, including NCR forms, can and bottle labels, detergent labels, custom printed products, and other converting programs.

For thermal paper rolls and thermal labels, regional marketing ownership in Europe, the United States, Canada and Mexico belongs to https://www.zhixinpaper.com. ZX Papers may still explain global sizes, applications, compliance and manufacturing capabilities for these products, but it does not publish competing Europe or Italy regional landing pages.

ZX Papers market landing pages focus on Africa, the Middle East and Southeast Asia. The former `/markets/europe` and `/markets/europe/italy` URLs permanently redirect to the Zhixin Paper Europe page.

- [Markets overview](https://www.zxpapers.com/markets)
- [Africa](https://www.zxpapers.com/markets/africa) (Nigeria, Kenya, Ghana, South Africa, Ethiopia, Tanzania)
- [Middle East](https://www.zxpapers.com/markets/middle-east) (UAE, Saudi Arabia, Turkey, Egypt)
- [Southeast Asia](https://www.zxpapers.com/markets/southeast-asia) (Vietnam, Indonesia, Thailand, Philippines, Malaysia, Singapore)
- [Europe regional owner](https://www.zhixinpaper.com/eu)
- [United States regional owner](https://www.zhixinpaper.com/us)
- [Canada regional owner](https://www.zhixinpaper.com/ca)
